name: drax-cc
description: drax-cc — lean, on-demand agentic orchestration for solo founders, native to Claude Code.

plugins.name: drax-cc
plugins.description: The CEO opens every run via /drax-init: detect the repo, report state, settle continue-vs-new, fix the scenario (product / marketing / sell-more), and name the first activation. On-demand orchestration; the Chairman stays hidden until venture-capital intent.
